description.p: "I may be small, but I'll still kick your ass!"

Fennecs are vulpine humanoids. They have the lush, furry tail of a fox. They have big ears like a fennec fox and appear to be anthropomorphic fennce foxes. They have a relatively similar body to humans, with the same bipedal limb structure.

Fennecs have been around since the beginning of the world, but nobody really knows where they came from. Were they the first humanoids? Or did a human make them because he was bored? Nobody knows, only the gods, though it's pretty obvious they weren't the first humans. Most people believe they rose up along the time humans learned to organize in a modern-day manner. The forces of Faerie leaking into the world probably caused some changes in the local wildlife.

Fennecs have a very pack like society. They tend to keep families close as well as clans. Fennecs usually live in or near small towns or in close-knit communities, typically in or near deserts. They love and care for people in their families or clans. Whenever they commit crimes in the clan, they are branded and casted out from their clan with great sorrow. In fennec society, the males travel more than the females, mainly to patrol and protect their clan. For females, they stay with the cubs but have been known to venture out into the world, seeking new opportunities outside the tribe.
Fennec names often take after their Arabic origin, however this is not always the case. They can also become words from their own culture if they wish.

ul.li: Male Names: Aarib, Abdul, Badruddeen, Basheer, Faatin, Isaam, Haitham, Luwai, Mahuroos, Shaamikh, Taariq, Umair
Female Names: Aatifa, Adharaa, Fat'hiyaa, Fikra, Muzna, Naseeba, Rafeeda, Sitaara, Zakiyya

description.p: Ability Score Increase. Your Dexterity score increases by 2 and your Constitution Score increases by 1.
Age. Fennec's generally reach adulthood around the age of 10. They live to around the ages of 50 to 75.
Alignment. Fennec's alignment usually go to lawful neutral.
Size. Fennec's are generally shorter than humans and average about 3' to 5' and 50-70 lb. Your size is Small.
Speed. Despite your small size, you are quite agile. Your base walking speed is 30 feet.
Darkvision. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can't discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.
Sneaky. You hail from sneaky foxes. You are proficient in Stealth.
Keen Hearing. Your ears are very sensitive. You are proficient in Perception and have advantage with Perception checks involving hearing.

Claws. Your claws are natural weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. If you hit with them, you deal slashing damage equal to 1d4 + your Strength modifier, instead of the bludgeoning damage normal for an unarmed strike.
Languages. You can speak, read, and write Common and Sylvan.

setters.set: Aarib, Abdul, Badruddeen, Basheer, Faatin, Isaam, Haitham, Luwai, Mahuroos, Shaamikh, Taariq, Umair
Aatifa, Adharaa, Fat'hiyaa, Fikra, Muzna, Naseeba, Rafeeda, Sitaara, Zakiyya

description.p: You hail from crafty, slinking foxes. You are proficient in the Stealth skill.

sheet.description: You hail from crafty, slinking foxes. You are proficient in the Stealth skill.

description.p: Your ears are very sensitive. You are proficient in Perception and have advantage with Perception checks involving hearing.

sheet.description: Your ears are very sensitive. You are proficient in Perception and have advantage with Perception checks involving hearing.

description.p: Your claws are natural weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. If you hit with them, you deal slashing damage equal to 1d4 + your Strength modifier, instead of the bludgeoning damage normal for an unarmed strike.

sheet.description: Your claws are natural weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. If you hit with them, you deal slashing damage equal to 1d4 + your Strength modifier, instead of the bludgeoning damage normal for an unarmed strike.
